title: Auriga Health - Runway & Stability Sprint Handoff
preview: Quarterly health + runway sync focused on right-sizing a Dedicated pilot to stabilize latency and cost. Customer concerned about recent token spend spikes and p99 tail latency; security team requested hard guarantees and KMS/HSM detail. Agreed next steps: pricing SOW, latency benchmark, VPC staging access, and pilot...
text: Quarterly health + runway sync focused on right-sizing a Dedicated pilot to stabilize latency and cost. Customer concerned about recent token spend spikes and p99 tail latency; security team requested hard guarantees and KMS/HSM detail. Agreed next steps: pricing SOW, latency benchmark, VPC staging access, and pilot kickoff planning.

title: 2026-04-09-steady-state-throttling-prefetch-heartbeat-maxnumseqs-tune
preview: Deep dive focused on steady-state throughput tuning for on-prem VPC deployment: continuous batching behavior, scheduler parameters (max_num_seqs, token caps), prefetch/heartbeat for KV cache, and quantization fallback tradeoffs. Customer constrained by strict SLOs (95th < 250ms) and data residency; interested in Red...
text: Deep dive focused on steady-state throughput tuning for on-prem VPC deployment: continuous batching behavior, scheduler parameters (max_num_seqs, token caps), prefetch/heartbeat for KV cache, and quantization fallback tradeoffs. Customer constrained by strict SLOs (95th < 250ms) and data residency; interested in Redwood private+dedicated hybrid. Action plan: exchange knobs, run steady-state test, and reconvene.
